site.name: Ads AI Creator

pages.title: Product Overview
pages.description: What the site is and which public pages matter.
pages.text:
# Ads AI Creator - Generate Ads with AI

Ads AI Creator generates ad creatives, copy, and visuals using AI so marketers can iterate on campaigns faster.

## Site basics
- Site ID: ads-ai-creator
- Website: https://adsaicreator.com
- Default locale: en
- Locales: en

## Public feature scope
- image gen

## Official website
https://adsaicreator.com
